subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever remained hidden within the Essence of His Being and treasured in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مکنونا فی کینونه ذاته و مخزونا فی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
